IMG20260303135925.jpg.description: Side elevation of a building wing featuring horizontal navy and white banding, ribbon windows, and a foreground landscape of dry grass and palm trees.
IMG20260303135925.jpg.strengths_mazaia: Strong horizontal linearity and rhythm. Effective use of contrasting academy navy and clinical white. Established biophilic elements (palms).
IMG20260303135925.jpg.weaknesses_oyub: Dry, unmaintained ground cover (dry grass). Visual clutter from exposed AC drainage pipes. Visible surface dirt on white spandrel panels.
IMG20260303135925.jpg.opportunities_fors: Replace ground cover with resilient xeriscaping or synthetic turf. Integrate AC drainage into a unified vertical chase. Add night facade illumination along blue bands.
IMG20260303135925.jpg.risks_mokhatir: Potential for water staining expansion if drainage isn't addressed. High solar heat gain through large ribbon windows without external shading.
IMG20260303135925.jpg.key_elements: Ribbon windows, Navy bands, Palm trees, Dry grass

IMG20260303135931.jpg.description: Corner view of a white rectangular volume featuring an extensive Islamic geometric concrete screen, framed by green hedges.
IMG20260303135931.jpg.strengths_mazaia: Success in integrating cultural identity via geometric motifs. Depth created by screen shadows improves facade texture. Good condition of trimmed hedges.
IMG20260303135931.jpg.weaknesses_oyub: Visible weathering on the concrete screen edges. Lack of verticality in the surrounding landscape to balance the horizontal mass.
IMG20260303135931.jpg.opportunities_fors: Replace concrete screen with a high-performance GFRC version for sharper detail. Add up-lighting to the screen to emphasize geometry at night.
IMG20260303135931.jpg.risks_mokhatir: Structural fatigue of old concrete screens. Accumulation of dust and birds nesting in screen perforations.
IMG20260303135931.jpg.key_elements: Islamic Screen, White Volume, Trimmed Hedges

IMG20260303135934.jpg.description: Perspective shot showing the transition from a highly articulated white screen block to a simpler ribbon-window wing.
IMG20260303135934.jpg.strengths_mazaia: Dynamic transition between solid/perforated and transparent surfaces. Functional separation of architectural languages.
IMG20260303135934.jpg.weaknesses_oyub: Jarring contrast in material quality between screen blocks and painted walls. Visible roof-level MEP equipment.
IMG20260303135934.jpg.opportunities_fors: Unify the two sections with a continuous canopy or light skin. Create a 'vertical garden' on the blank side-walls of the screen block.
IMG20260303135934.jpg.risks_mokhatir: Thermal bridging at the window junctions. Inconsistent aging of different paint types.
IMG20260303135934.jpg.key_elements: Material Transition, Facade Contrast, Roof MEP

IMG20260303140009.jpg.description: Wider perspectival shot of the main building mass with a palm tree trunk acting as a foreground vertical element.
IMG20260303140009.jpg.strengths_mazaia: Strong institutional presence. Good spatial hierarchy between mass and void. The palm tree adds human scale and context.
IMG20260303140009.jpg.weaknesses_oyub: The flat white surfaces appear 'sterile' under harsh sunlight. Inconsistent window treatments (some curtains are mismatched).
IMG20260303140009.jpg.opportunities_fors: Introduce automated internal blinds or smart glass to unify window appearance. Use the palm tree for creative shadow-casting across the facade.
IMG20260303140009.jpg.risks_mokhatir: Glare and reflection from white surfaces onto high-traffic pathways.
IMG20260303140009.jpg.key_elements: Institutional Mass, Palm Trunk, Window Inconsistency

IMG20260303140025.jpg.description: Stone-paved courtyard pathway leading toward a corner of the building, flanked by manicured hedges and palm trees.
IMG20260303140025.jpg.strengths_mazaia: Defined pedestrian pathways. Successful 'green oasis' atmosphere within a dense campus. Stone paving is durable.
IMG20260303140025.jpg.weaknesses_oyub: Staining on the stone pavers. Lack of seating or shaded rest areas along the path.
IMG20260303140025.jpg.opportunities_fors: Add integrated stone/wood benches along the path. Introduce solar-powered bollard lighting for safe night passage.
IMG20260303140025.jpg.risks_mokhatir: Tripping hazards from uneven pavers due to tree root expansion.

IMG20260303140100.jpg.description: Close-up elevation of the white concrete screen block, showcasing the intricate Islamic interlocking star pattern.
IMG20260303140100.jpg.strengths_mazaia: High decorative and symbolic value. Excellent natural light filtration into interior spaces. Iconic 'Al-Azhar' identifier.
IMG20260303140100.jpg.weaknesses_oyub: Difficulty in cleaning the internal surfaces of the screen. Significant grime buildup in lower corners.
IMG20260303140100.jpg.opportunities_fors: Upgrade to a self-cleaning nanomaterial coating. Integrate color-changing LED strips into the frame of the screen for events.
IMG20260303140100.jpg.risks_mokhatir: Corrosion of internal reinforcing steel within the concrete screen (spalling risk).
IMG20260303140100.jpg.key_elements: Islamic Star pattern, Natural light filter, Spalling risk

IMG20260303140110.jpg.description: Wide-angle view of the central landscape featuring two large, circular stone planters with centered trees.
IMG20260303140110.jpg.strengths_mazaia: Symmetry and balance in planning. Excellent shade provision in the hot climate. Durable stone construction for planters.
IMG20260303140110.jpg.weaknesses_oyub: Underutilized negative space between planters. Some dry soil visible despite the presence of many trees.
IMG20260303140110.jpg.opportunities_fors: Turn circular planters into interactive 'study pods' with Wi-Fi and power outlets. Add a water feature (fountain) to improve microclimate.
IMG20260303140110.jpg.risks_mokhatir: Soil erosion during heavy rain due to lack of diverse ground cover.
IMG20260303140110.jpg.key_elements: Circular Planters, Shade Canopy, Symmetrical Planning

IMG20260303140125.jpg.description: A stone path leading directly toward the building entrance, framed symmetrically by large, leafy trees.
IMG20260303140125.jpg.strengths_mazaia: Strong axial lead-in to the building. Mature trees provide a significant cooling effect and aesthetic softness.
IMG20260303140125.jpg.weaknesses_oyub: The building facade in the background appears flat and under-designed compared to the rich foreground.
IMG20260303140125.jpg.opportunities_fors: Add a prominent entrance canopy that extends out to meet the path. Use hanging light fixtures in the trees for a dramatic night entrance.
IMG20260303140125.jpg.risks_mokhatir: Falling branches from unpruned trees onto the main path.
IMG20260303140125.jpg.key_elements: Axial Path, Mature Trees, Entrance Frame

IMG20260303140159.jpg.description: Perspective view of a long wing with continuous navy blue spandrels and white structural lines.
IMG20260303140159.jpg.strengths_mazaia: Clean, modern, and clinical aesthetic. Reinforces a horizontal 'medical' identity of efficiency.
IMG20260303140159.jpg.weaknesses_oyub: Visually chaotic window air conditioning units break the clean lines. Exposed electrical wiring on the facade.
IMG20260303140159.jpg.opportunities_fors: Install a central HVAC system to remove window units. Apply a vertical louver system over AC clusters to hide them visually.
IMG20260303140159.jpg.risks_mokhatir: Water leakage from improperly installed window AC units into the building wall.
IMG20260303140159.jpg.key_elements: Navy Spandrels, AC Clutter, Hospital Aesthetic

IMG20260303140204.jpg.description: Textured close-up of a palm trunk with the Faculty facade and concrete screen blurred in the background.
IMG20260303140204.jpg.strengths_mazaia: Great potential for biophilic integration. The tree adds organic variety to the rigid architectural geometry.
IMG20260303140204.jpg.weaknesses_oyub: The palm provides minimal shade to the actual facade. Base of the tree is unlandscaped (dry dirt).
IMG20260303140204.jpg.opportunities_fors: Add decorative lighting to the palm trunk. Install a small succulent garden at the base of each palm.
IMG20260303140204.jpg.risks_mokhatir: Palm tree roots interfering with basement foundations if planted too close.
IMG20260303140204.jpg.key_elements: Biophilic variety, Dry dirt base, Organic texture

IMG20260303140235.jpg.description: The main authoritative entrance portal featuring polished black granite, golden Arabic/English typography, and Al-Azhar logo.
IMG20260303140235.jpg.strengths_mazaia: High prestige and authority conveyed by black granite. Excellent material contrast. Clear, dignified institutional signage.
IMG20260303140235.jpg.weaknesses_oyub: The granite surfaces show fingerprint 'clouds' and dust easily. The entrance threshold (floor) is uneven.
IMG20260303140235.jpg.opportunities_fors: Extend the black granite into a wider plaza area. Introduce a digital info-screen integrated into the granite wall for faculty news.
IMG20260303140235.jpg.risks_mokhatir: Thermal expansion of dark stone in direct sun leading to joint cracking.
IMG20260303140235.jpg.key_elements: Black Granite, Golden Signage, Institutional Logo

IMG20260303140255.jpg.description: Angled view of the entrance portal showing the juxtaposition between the heavy black mass and the delicate white geometric screen.
IMG20260303140255.jpg.strengths_mazaia: Masterful play of light and shadow. The contrast between 'Authority' (Black) and 'Heritage' (White) is clear.
IMG20260303140255.jpg.weaknesses_oyub: Visible sealant staining in the joints between the granite and the white walls. Poor lighting in the door vestibule.
IMG20260303140255.jpg.opportunities_fors: Clean and re-seal joints with matching black silicon. Add a recessed 'glow' light between the granite and the white wall.
IMG20260303140255.jpg.risks_mokhatir: Vandalism/Scratches on the polished granite at lower levels.
IMG20260303140255.jpg.key_elements: Mass vs Screen, Joint Staining, Vestibule Gloom

IMG20260303140300.jpg.description: Frontal close-up of the entrance doors with reflective glazing and adjacent concrete screen details.
IMG20260303140300.jpg.strengths_mazaia: Reflective glass adds a modern layer. The concrete screen provides a perfect aesthetic neighbor to the modern doors.
IMG20260303140300.jpg.weaknesses_oyub: The aluminum door frames look 'thin' and budget-oriented next to the heavy stone. Steps are stained and worn.
IMG20260303140300.jpg.opportunities_fors: Replace door frames with heavier, custom bronze or high-grade black anodized aluminum. Resurface steps with matching granite.
IMG20260303140300.jpg.risks_mokhatir: Low transparency from outside during the day renders the entrance uninviting.
IMG20260303140300.jpg.key_elements: Aluminum frames, Reflective glass, Stained steps

IMG20260303140344.jpg.description: Full street-level elevation showing the symmetrical layout of the main faculty block and perimeter fence.
IMG20260303140344.jpg.strengths_mazaia: Grand institutional scale. Excellent symmetry. Clear hierarchy with the central black entrance.
IMG20260303140344.jpg.weaknesses_oyub: Visible laundry/curtains and debris in some windows. The perimeter fence is utilitarian and lacks aesthetic value.
IMG20260303140344.jpg.opportunities_fors: Redesign the perimeter fence to match the Islamic geometric screens. Plant a thick 'green hedge' along the fence line to soften the street presence.
IMG20260303140344.jpg.risks_mokhatir: Street noise and pollution affecting the first-floor offices.

IMG20260303140359.jpg.description: Perspective from the street including a directional signpost for the Central Library and the Faculty building.
IMG20260303140359.jpg.strengths_mazaia: Good orientation/wayfinding marker. The building acts as a strong landmark.
IMG20260303140359.jpg.weaknesses_oyub: The signpost itself is dated and has peeling vinyl. Street curb is damaged and messy.
IMG20260303140359.jpg.opportunities_fors: Update the wayfinding with a unified modern signage system. Repair the curb and add a dedicated student drop-off zone.
IMG20260303140359.jpg.risks_mokhatir: Visual clutter from mismatched street signs and poles.

IMG20260303140405.jpg.description: Mid-range street view with library signage in the foreground framing the horizontal faculty facade.
IMG20260303140405.jpg.strengths_mazaia: Effective layering of information. Blue signage echoes building color scheme.
IMG20260303140405.jpg.weaknesses_oyub: Signage pole is leaning slightly. Foreground sidewalk is narrow and cracked.
IMG20260303140405.jpg.opportunities_fors: Install digital wayfinding kiosks. Expand the student walkway along the perimeter.
IMG20260303140405.jpg.risks_mokhatir: Pedestrian safety risks due to narrow sidewalks next to moving traffic.
IMG20260303140405.jpg.key_elements: Signage Layering, Color Echo, Sidewalk cracks

IMG20260303140416.jpg.description: Street view showing parked cars along the building perimeter, with the black entrance portal visible in the distance.
IMG20260303140416.jpg.strengths_mazaia: Demonstrates the scale of the campus. Clear visibility of the main portal even from an angle.
IMG20260303140416.jpg.weaknesses_oyub: Parking management is disorganized. Cars partially block the perimeter view.
IMG20260303140416.jpg.opportunities_fors: Establish a dedicated parking structure to clear the street-level view of the facade.
IMG20260303140416.jpg.risks_mokhatir: Security vulnerability due to uncontrolled proximity of vehicles to the main building.

IMG20260303141011.jpg.description: Vertical blue volume containing the stairwell, integrated into the horizontal renovated facade.
IMG20260303141011.jpg.strengths_mazaia: Strong vertical emphasis breaks horizontal monotony. Bold color application. Modern clean lines.
IMG20260303141011.jpg.weaknesses_oyub: Lack of shading on the vertical glass slit. Visible AC units on the adjacent wing.
IMG20260303141011.jpg.opportunities_fors: Install vertical fins on the stairwell glass to reduce solar gain. Group AC units in a central outdoor plant area.
IMG20260303141011.jpg.risks_mokhatir: High heat gain in the stairwell due to the large vertical glazing.

IMG20260303141051.jpg.description: Frontal elevation of the beige building featuring symmetrical recessed window bands.
IMG20260303141051.jpg.weaknesses_oyub: Visible grime/staining on the main concrete mass. The building looks 'tired' and neglected.
IMG20260303141051.jpg.opportunities_fors: Apply a textured high-performance paint. Add a secondary skin of laser-cut Islamic patterns to modernize.
IMG20260303141051.jpg.risks_mokhatir: Deep-set grime could lead to permanent material staining or chemical degradation.

IMG20260303141116.jpg.description: Angled perspective of the beige building wings.
IMG20260303141116.jpg.strengths_mazaia: Strong volumetric presence. Clear separation of floors.
IMG20260303141116.jpg.weaknesses_oyub: Lack of architectural 'softness' or greenery on the facade levels.
IMG20260303141116.jpg.opportunities_fors: Introduce balcony planters or 'green ribbons' between window bands.
IMG20260303141116.jpg.risks_mokhatir: Harsh shadows making the building appear more dilapidated than it is.
IMG20260303141116.jpg.key_elements: Volumetric presence, Floor separation, Harsh shadows

IMG20260303141126.jpg.description: Open ground floor area under pilotis being used as a temporary storage/workspace for old furniture.
IMG20260303141126.jpg.strengths_mazaia: Versatile shaded space. Structural capacity to hold large loads.
IMG20260303141126.jpg.weaknesses_oyub: Significant visual clutter. Makes the institution look disorganized and 'under-construction'.
IMG20260303141126.jpg.opportunities_fors: Enclose this area with glass to create an 'Innovation Hub' or student lounge. Install organized storage cabinets.
IMG20260303141126.jpg.risks_mokhatir: Safety hazard from sharp furniture edges. Fire risk from stacked wood/materials.
IMG20260303141126.jpg.key_elements: Pilotis area, Visual clutter, Temporary storage

IMG20260303141130.jpg.description: Wide shot of campus greenery with some unpaved areas and temporary construction structures in the distance.
IMG20260303141130.jpg.strengths_mazaia: Mature trees provide shade. Large open space with potential for extensive landscaping.
IMG20260303141130.jpg.weaknesses_oyub: Unpaved dirt patches look messy. The presence of 'shacks' or temporary structures ruins the institutional dignity.
IMG20260303141130.jpg.opportunities_fors: Design a master landscape plan with uniform paving and irrigation. Remove temporary huts.
IMG20260303141130.jpg.risks_mokhatir: Dust from unpaved areas entering the medical faculty buildings.
IMG20260303141130.jpg.key_elements: Mature trees, Unpaved dirt, Institutional dignity

IMG20260303141146.jpg.description: An internal door with metal grilles. Walls show significant peeling and bubbling paint.
IMG20260303141146.jpg.weaknesses_oyub: Severe maintenance neglect. Peeling paint suggests moisture issues within the walls.
IMG20260303141146.jpg.opportunities_fors: Fix the underlying plumbing/seepage issues. Repaint with antimicrobial 'medical grade' paint.
IMG20260303141146.jpg.risks_mokhatir: Mold growth and respiratory issues for students/staff. Negative psychological impact of 'decay'.
IMG20260303141146.jpg.key_elements: Peeling paint, Metal grilles, Moisture issues

IMG20260303141158.jpg.description: Interior lobby leading to the Histology and Cell Biology department, featuring glass partition doors.
IMG20260303141158.jpg.strengths_mazaia: Clear signage. Natural light from the glass doors. Wide space for student flow.
IMG20260303141158.jpg.weaknesses_oyub: Dated flooring material (terrazzo). Exposed ceiling wiring/pipes.
IMG20260303141158.jpg.opportunities_fors: Install a modular false ceiling to hide utilities. Upgrade to high-gloss medical-grade flooring.
IMG20260303141158.jpg.risks_mokhatir: Exposed wires may pose a fire or electrical risk.
IMG20260303141158.jpg.key_elements: Histology Dept, Glass doors, Terrazzo floor

IMG20260303141224.jpg.description: Marble-clad entrance archway to the Department of Anatomy & Embryology.
IMG20260303141224.jpg.strengths_mazaia: Premium material (marble) creates a sense of prestige. Traditional 'stepped' arch design.
IMG20260303141224.jpg.weaknesses_oyub: The marble is dull and needs polishing. The signage uses a dated font/mounting.
IMG20260303141224.jpg.opportunities_fors: Backlight the marble portal with LEDs. Update the signage with contemporary gold lettering on black glass.
IMG20260303141224.jpg.risks_mokhatir: Staining of the porous marble due to high-touch traffic.
IMG20260303141224.jpg.key_elements: Marble portal, Anatomy Dept, Stepped arch

IMG20260303141230.jpg.description: Close-up of the Anatomy Department entrance, showing details of the marble and the directory signs.
IMG20260303141230.jpg.strengths_mazaia: Informative. The use of gold lettering adds institutional weight.
IMG20260303141230.jpg.weaknesses_oyub: Mismatched sign styles (white plastic vs gold on marble). Cluttered appearance with too many small plaques.
IMG20260303141230.jpg.opportunities_fors: Consolidate all department information into a single digital display screen next to the portal.
IMG20260303141230.jpg.risks_mokhatir: Information overload for students trying to find their way.

IMG20260303141310.jpg.description: A view from inside the building looking through a window at the interior courtyard greenery.
IMG20260303141310.jpg.strengths_mazaia: Biophilic connection (view of nature). Good natural light penetration.
IMG20260303141310.jpg.weaknesses_oyub: Windows are dirty and have old metal bars. View is partially blocked by old cables.
IMG20260303141310.jpg.opportunities_fors: Replace with large, frameless glass panes to maximize the view. Clean out external cabling.
IMG20260303141310.jpg.risks_mokhatir: Dust accumulation on the old window frames affecting indoor air quality.
IMG20260303141310.jpg.key_elements: Biophilic connection, Dirty windows, External cables

IMG20260303141328.jpg.description: An interior corridor showing signs of ongoing work, with a large wooden ladder present.
IMG20260303141328.jpg.strengths_mazaia: High ceilings allow for a better feeling of space. Evidence of active maintenance.
IMG20260303141328.jpg.weaknesses_oyub: Hazardous working environment (unattended ladder). Uneven wall finishes where paint has been scraped.
IMG20260303141328.jpg.opportunities_fors: Install a 'dropped' ceiling grid for quick access to utilities while hiding the mess. Add wall protection rails.
IMG20260303141328.jpg.risks_mokhatir: Trip and fall accidents for students. 'Broken windows' theory—visible work make the whole building feel like a site.
IMG20260303141328.jpg.key_elements: Active maintenance, Wooden ladder, Wall finish

IMG20260303141407.jpg.description: A stone sculpture representing the logo of the Histology department, placed in a corridor.
IMG20260303141407.jpg.strengths_mazaia: Unique departmental branding. High artistic and sentimental value to the faculty.
IMG20260303141407.jpg.weaknesses_oyub: Poor display environment—it's tucked in a corner with messy wiring in the background.
IMG20260303141407.jpg.opportunities_fors: Integrate the sculpture into a dedicated 'Heritage Niche' with museum-quality museum spot-lighting.
IMG20260303141407.jpg.risks_mokhatir: Accidental damage to the sculpture due to its unprotected placement in a high-traffic zone.

IMG20260303141412.jpg.description: Perspective down a long corridor with exposed pipes on the walls and dated fluorescent lighting.
IMG20260303141412.jpg.strengths_mazaia: Ample width for traffic. Clear sightlines.
IMG20260303141412.jpg.weaknesses_oyub: Extremely 'sanatorium' / industrial feel. The exposed pipes are unsightly and accumulate dust.
IMG20260303141412.jpg.opportunities_fors: Box in the pipes with sleek metal or gypsum chases. Upgrade to soft, indirect LED lighting.
IMG20260303141412.jpg.risks_mokhatir: Pipes leaking over expensive medical equipment or data cables.
IMG20260303141412.jpg.key_elements: Exposed pipes, Long corridor, Industrial feel

IMG20260303141453.jpg.description: A small prayer space (Musalla) carved out under a concrete staircase, with red carpets.
IMG20260303141453.jpg.strengths_mazaia: Respectful provision for spiritual needs. Efficient use of dead space under stairs.
IMG20260303141453.jpg.weaknesses_oyub: The area looks cramped and temporary. Lack of proper wall finishes (base concrete exposed).
IMG20260303141453.jpg.opportunities_fors: Design a formal, beautiful Musalla with Islamic wood panelling and dedicated shoe storage. Improve lighting.
IMG20260303141453.jpg.risks_mokhatir: Potential fire risk if prayer mats are near electrical panels under the stairs.

IMG20260303141511.jpg.description: Entrance to the Quality Assurance Unit with a decorative black wrought iron gate and stone-textured walls.
IMG20260303141511.jpg.strengths_mazaia: Distinctive aesthetic. Solid and secure feel. Use of stone cladding adds texture.
IMG20260303141511.jpg.weaknesses_oyub: Style is inconsistent with the rest of the modern blue/white identity. Exposed wiring above the door.
IMG20260303141511.jpg.opportunities_fors: Unify the cladding style across all administrative offices. Conceal the wiring behind a header panel.
IMG20260303141511.jpg.risks_mokhatir: Fragmented interior identity makes it hard for visitors to recognize 'official' areas.
IMG20260303141511.jpg.key_elements: Wrought iron gate, Stone cladding, Quality Assurance

IMG20260303140439.jpg.description: A very wide perspective of the long horizontal facade highlighting the repetitive window rhythm.
IMG20260303140439.jpg.strengths_mazaia: Strong architectural rhythm. Good sense of continuity across the large urban block.
IMG20260303140439.jpg.weaknesses_oyub: Repetition becomes monotonous over such a long distance. Lack of vertical breaks.
IMG20260303140439.jpg.opportunities_fors: Introduce vertical 'identity panels' or green walls at regular intervals to break the horizontal monotony.
IMG20260303140439.jpg.risks_mokhatir: Visual fatigue for pedestrians walking alongside the building.

IMG20260303140453.jpg.description: Elevation focused on the central block, framed by a utilitarian street lamp pole.
IMG20260303140453.jpg.strengths_mazaia: Central block stands out as a high-quality volume. Good daylighting on the facade.
IMG20260303140453.jpg.weaknesses_oyub: Visual intrusion from the low-quality street lamp pole. Visible AC pipes on the side of the central block.
IMG20260303140453.jpg.opportunities_fors: Design custom 'Faculty of Medicine' street lamps that match the building's aesthetic. Hide pipes behind a facade skin.
IMG20260303140453.jpg.risks_mokhatir: Pole obstructing emergency vehicle access or sightlines.
IMG20260303140453.jpg.key_elements: Central Block, Visual Intrusion, Lighting design

IMG20260303140459.jpg.description: Clean, distant elevation of the blue and white horizontal block under a clear sky.
IMG20260303140459.jpg.strengths_mazaia: Excellent color contrast against the sky. Modern and professional institutional look.
IMG20260303140459.jpg.weaknesses_oyub: The top edge of the building (parapet) looks unfinished or thin.
IMG20260303140459.jpg.opportunities_fors: Add a decorative cornice or a 'smart roof' solar array to crown the building.
IMG20260303140459.jpg.risks_mokhatir: Potential for the blue color to fade under intense UV exposure over time.
IMG20260303140459.jpg.key_elements: Clean elevation, Blue/White contrast, Top parapet

IMG20260303141559.jpg.description: Main administrative lobby in the north wing, featuring info boards and student activity.

strengths: Good natural light from far ends

IMG20260303141614.jpg.description: Close-up of the entrance door featuring a distinctive geometric Islamic-inspired metal screen.

IMG20260303141617.jpg.description: Internal view of the geometric entrance doors, highlighting the silhouette effect.

threats: Slow response due to workspace limits

IMG20260303141702.jpg.description: Transition hall leading to stairs and upper administrative offices.

IMG20260303141731.jpg.description: Detail of the exterior geometric concrete sun-screen, a key heritage element.

VID20260303141856_frame_001.jpg.description: Mid-ground video frame highlighting the building's verticality through the trees.

VID20260303141856_frame_002.jpg.description: Video frame panning towards the main entrance portal.

weaknesses: Lack of shading at waiting points

VID20260303141856_frame_003.jpg.description: Close-up video frame of the main entrance portal through the greenery.

IMG20260303142431.jpg.description: Internal corridor view featuring a student, providing scale and human context.

VID20260303141856_frame_000.jpg.description: Wide video frame showing the initial approach to the building through the campus garden.

strengths: Soft transition from city to campus
انتقال ناعم من المدينة للحرم الجامعي

IMG20260303140547.jpg.description: View of the older, unrenovated beige brutalist wing with boxy, recessed windows.
IMG20260303140547.jpg.strengths_mazaia: Honest structural expression. Solid, earthquake-resistant appearance.
IMG20260303140547.jpg.weaknesses_oyub: Deeply dated aesthetic. Visible water damage and grime on the beige plaster. Depressing 'institutional' color.
IMG20260303140547.jpg.opportunities_fors: Perform a complete facade 'recladding' to match the renovated blue and white wings. Add external thermal insulation.
IMG20260303140547.jpg.risks_mokhatir: Concrete carbonation and reinforcement rust due to aged plaster not protecting the core structure.
IMG20260303140547.jpg.key_elements: Brutalist wing, Recessed windows, Material decay

IMG20260303140733.jpg.description: Perspective of the heavy beige masses, emphasizing the solid concrete volumes and lack of decorative detail.
IMG20260303140733.jpg.strengths_mazaia: Clear architectural massing. Strong geometric presence.
IMG20260303140733.jpg.weaknesses_oyub: Lack of human scale. The building feels like a 'fortress' rather than a place of healing/learning.
IMG20260303140733.jpg.opportunities_fors: Introduce large-scale architectural murals or vertical gardens to humanize the massive walls.
IMG20260303140733.jpg.risks_mokhatir: Heat island effect from the massive exposed concrete surfaces.
IMG20260303140733.jpg.key_elements: Heavy massing, Geometric presence, Fortress feel

IMG20260303140739.jpg.description: Courtyard interior featuring a vibrant red flowering tree, contrasting with the dry ground and building wings.
IMG20260303140739.jpg.strengths_mazaia: Vivid color splash from the Flame Tree. Good internal focus for the courtyard.
IMG20260303140739.jpg.weaknesses_oyub: Debris and dry leaves littering the unpaved ground areas. Visual discord between the tree and the aging facade.
IMG20260303140739.jpg.opportunities_fors: Pave the area under the tree with decorative porous paving. Install night lighting to spotlight the flowering canopy.
IMG20260303140739.jpg.risks_mokhatir: Fire risk from accumulated dry leaves in the hot season.
IMG20260303140739.jpg.key_elements: Flame Tree, Red flowers, Dry debris

IMG20260303140743.jpg.description: Close view of a circular stone planter with integrated seating steps and a small tree.
IMG20260303140743.jpg.strengths_mazaia: Functional social space. Strong geometric design. Good use of durable natural stone.
IMG20260303140743.jpg.weaknesses_oyub: The planter is filled with weeds rather than curated shrubs. Stone needs pressure washing.
IMG20260303140743.jpg.opportunities_fors: Convert the planter into an 'aquaponic' system or a high-end flower bed. Add backrests to the seating area.
IMG20260303140743.jpg.risks_mokhatir: Structural cracking of the planter wall from tree root pressure.
IMG20260303140743.jpg.key_elements: Circular design, Integrated seating, Weed growth

IMG20260303140810.jpg.description: Elevated view of the older beige wing showing a large-scale, brutalist concrete sun-screen with square perforations.
IMG20260303140810.jpg.strengths_mazaia: Effective passive solar shading. Consistent with Mid-Century Modern architectural history.
IMG20260303140810.jpg.weaknesses_oyub: The screen is heavy and visually suffocating. Significant grime and bird droppings inside the holes.
IMG20260303140810.jpg.opportunities_fors: Replace with automated metal kinetic screens. Paint the screen a lighter, reflective color to reduce heat absorption.
IMG20260303140810.jpg.risks_mokhatir: Falling concrete chunks (spalling) from the aging screen.
IMG20260303140810.jpg.key_elements: Brutalist screen, Solar shading, Heavy mass

IMG20260303140837.jpg.description: Shaded ground-floor entrance area supported by thick concrete pilotis in the older beige block.
IMG20260303140837.jpg.strengths_mazaia: Provides excellent shade and natural ventilation for the entrance area. Functional undercover circulation.
IMG20260303140837.jpg.weaknesses_oyub: Extremely dark and uninviting. Feels like a 'back-of-house' area rather than a main entrance. Ceiling is in poor condition.
IMG20260303140837.jpg.opportunities_fors: Install bright, architectural LED ceiling panels. Add glass storefronts between columns to create a bright indoor lobby.
IMG20260303140837.jpg.risks_mokhatir: Poor lighting creates security 'blind spots' at night.

IMG20260303140912.jpg.description: Full-height view of the aging beige monolith, showcasing the repetitive vertical and horizontal window bands.
IMG20260303140912.jpg.strengths_mazaia: Rhythmic window placement creates a sense of order. Clear floor-by-floor articulation.
IMG20260303140912.jpg.weaknesses_oyub: Uniform beige color lacks any visual relief or accent. Facade appears 'dead' architecturaly.
IMG20260303140912.jpg.opportunities_fors: Introduce 'color accents' on window frames. Apply a vertical facade lighting scheme. Add a mesh screen for better aesthetics and shading.
IMG20260303140912.jpg.risks_mokhatir: Visual degradation leading to a 'slum-like' institutional appearance if left unpainted.
IMG20260303140912.jpg.key_elements: Rhythmic windows, Beige monolith, Dead facade

IMG20260303140919.jpg.description: Low-angle shot of a landscape path bounded by a low stone wall and trimmed hedges.
IMG20260303140919.jpg.strengths_mazaia: Clean edges and well-defined borders. Good transition between path and green space.
IMG20260303140919.jpg.weaknesses_oyub: Path material (asphalt/concrete) is cracked. The stone wall is too low to be useful for seating.
IMG20260303140919.jpg.opportunities_fors: Resurface path with porous resin-bound gravel. Raise the wall height to create comfortable 'campus benches'.
IMG20260303140919.jpg.risks_mokhatir: Uneven surfaces leading to water pooling during rain.
IMG20260303140919.jpg.key_elements: Defined borders, Low wall, Cracked path

IMG20260303140934.jpg.description: Sharp corner view of the beige building wings meeting at a 90-degree angle.
IMG20260303140934.jpg.strengths_mazaia: Strong vertical corner line. Good volume definition.
IMG20260303140934.jpg.weaknesses_oyub: The 'dead angle' at the junction accumulates trash and dust. Lack of windows at the corner makes it look like a blank fortress.
IMG20260303140934.jpg.opportunities_fors: Install a corner-spanning glass element to open up views. Add a vertical 'Faculty Logo' sign on the blank corner wall.
IMG20260303140934.jpg.risks_mokhatir: Blind spots for campus security patrol.
IMG20260303140934.jpg.key_elements: Sharp corner, Blank walls, Volume definition

IMG20260303140940.jpg.description: Direct visual comparison between the newly renovated blue/white wing and the original beige block.
IMG20260303140940.jpg.strengths_mazaia: Perfect 'before and after' evidence. Highlights the success of the horizontal modernization strategy.
IMG20260303140940.jpg.weaknesses_oyub: The jarring visual disconnect between the two styles creates a fragmented institutional identity.
IMG20260303140940.jpg.opportunities_fors: Use this image to justify a complete renovation of the beige blocks to achieve 100% campus visual unity.
IMG20260303140940.jpg.risks_mokhatir: Psychological perception of 'tier-2' facilities for students/staff in the unrenovated wings.
IMG20260303140940.jpg.key_elements: Style Contrast, Identity Fragmentation, Renovation success

IMG20260303141530.jpg.description: Transition space with an institutional commemorative plaque on a stone pillar and a main stairwell.

weaknesses: Disconnected aesthetic between stone and paint
threats: Loss of institutional identity if plaque is ignored

opportunities: جدارية أو عمل فني في بئر السلم
threats: فقدان الهوية المؤسسية إذا تم تجاهل اللوحة
